title: Flintronic B7000 Super Glue, 4PCS 15ML Transparent Paste Adhesive, Multifunctional Repair Glues, Fast Repair and Quick Drying Strong Glue, Suitable for Glass, Phone, Jewelry, Wood, Metal, Fabric
features: 【STRONG BOND】Our glue effectively blocks gases, liquids, and air currents, offering exceptional adhesion and time-resistance. This means it won't crack or break over time. Furthermore, it dries completely clear, leaving no mark on the surface of the repaired item. Perfect for projects where appearance is paramount.

【NEEDLE DESIGN】Our glue is equipped with a precision nozzle for quick and accurate application. The tube cap is equipped with a needle, which not only prevents the glue from clogging, but also prevents the glue inside from drying out, making it very suitable for bonding crystals, metals and various jewelry parts.

【WIDE RANGE OF USES】This strong adhesive B7000 has a wide range of uses. Whether it is used on everyday items such as rhinestones, glass, ceramics and gemstones, or for DIY projects and industrial projects, it can work well and is a must-have tool for businesses, schools, offices and homes.
【WATERPROOF】Our glue is waterproof. Even if your project is exposed to humidity or rain or snow, it can maintain a strong bond and is suitable for a variety of indoor and outdoor environments.

【EASY TO USE】This B7000 glue comes in a convenient, squeezeable tube. Application is quick and easy. Simply apply it evenly to the surface and apply a little pressure to bond. It typically dries in 2-3 minutes, but it takes about 24-48 hours to fully dry and reach peak strength. Note: Before applying B7000, ensure the surface is clean and store the glue out of the reach of children.
description: Flintronic B7000 Super Glue - Whether you're repairing broken jewelry or creating a new craft, this glue will do the job with ease. - High-quality glue with long-lasting adhesion effectively saves you time and money, improving work efficiency. - Lightweight and compact, it's easy to carry and store in your bag for easy use. - Suitable for a variety of surfaces, including various shoe soles, jewelry repair, metal, leather, ceramic, and more.
